suggestion_reasons.Information Sequencing: Rubric-guided draft scored highest and user ranked it first — this criterion is working exactly as intended. Kept unchanged.
suggestion_reasons.Reader-Centered Framing: Rubric-guided draft scored highest and the user's commentary explicitly praised the reader-framing in the rubric-guided draft over the sender-framing in the others — criterion is doing its job. Kept unchanged.
suggestion_reasons.Specific Accountability: Both the rubric-guided and generic drafts scored 5, but the user's commentary reveals a more precise failure mode: the original preference draft's shared-doc approach is a disguised group-ask — it looks structured but offloads self-identification to recipients. Added a new dimension to make this failure mode explicit and detectable.
suggestion_reasons.Direct, Non-Corporate Tone: Rubric-guided draft scored highest and all three drafts scored 4 or above, indicating this criterion is well-calibrated. Kept unchanged.
suggestion_reasons.Clean, Decisive Endings: Rubric-guided draft scored highest and user confirmed the single-action close as a strength — criterion is working. Kept unchanged.
